name: Tuna Pizza W/Dough
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Mushrooms; sliced (fresh is probably better)
recipeInstructions:
Prepare the crust according to your machine's instructions for dough. When dough is finished, spread onto a greased pizza pan. Add toppings. Cook at 425°F, 15-17 minutes.
Topping:
Heat olive oil in a pan and sauté onion, mushrooms, and garlic until tender but not brown. Add tuna, tomato soup, and seasonings. Let cool slightly before spreading onto the pizza dough. This tastes better to me topped with cheddar cheese rather than mozzarella. Enjoy!
